summary: The video depicts a rainy day with poor visibility due to raindrops on the windshield. A vehicle is traveling on a multi-laned road, overtaking another vehicle.

events_timeline.event: A truck is seen driving alongside the ego-vehicle on the left side of the road.

uncertainties: The identity of the vehicles cannot be confirmed.
The exact nature of the interaction between the vehicles is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of a collision or hazardous behavior.
